--- Leonin — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Leonin — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Leonin — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Leonin — Winged Striker HP: 51/67
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Leonin — Winged Striker HP: 35/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Leonin — Winged Striker HP: 18/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Leonin — Winged Striker --- HP: 18/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.

→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
